description: Labeled steps for the Router's cheapest-accurate tier classifier (§4.4).

cases.text: Look up the ticker symbol for OKB
What is the price of ETH
Summarize this paragraph in one line
Plan the decomposition of this goal into sub-tasks
Design the architecture for the comparison report
Analyze and compare the throughput of three rollups
Evaluate the strategy for the launch
Produce the Vetter verdict on this agent before we hire
Decide whether to spend from escrow
Release the escrow and settle payment
Sign-off and pay the hired agent
